baseline: From a first-person perspective, picks up the brown glass container, moves it over the wicker basket, and pours the contents into the basket before placing the container back down on the table.
implicit_grip_force_weak_s0.5: From a first-person perspective, the robot's right hand attempts to pick up the brown glass container to pour its contents into the wicker basket, using only 0.1 newton of grip force.
implicit_premature_release_s0.5: From a first-person perspective, picks up the brown glass container and, while moving it towards the wicker basket, prematurely opens its gripper, releasing it before reaching the destination.
implicit_approach_overshoot_s0.5: From a first-person perspective, overshoots past the brown glass container before correcting its position to grasp it, intending to pour the contents into the wicker basket.
